message.content:
REVIEWED_FILES_COUNT: 20  
REVIEWED_FILES: README.md | START-HERE.md | INSTALL.md | EXAMPLE-TOUR.md | JUDGE-QUICKSTART.md | FAQ.md | SAFETY-AND-SCOPE.md | DATA-AND-PRIVACY.md | TERMS-OF-USE.md | SECURITY.md | SUPPORT.md | ATTRIBUTION.md | LICENSE.md | TRADEMARKS.md | NOTICE.md | CONTRIBUTING.md | BUILD-WEEK.md | RELEASE-NOTES-v0.1.5.md | VERIFICATION-v0.1.5.md | ARCHIVE-CUSTODY.md  
MATERIAL_DOCUMENTATION_FINDINGS_COUNT: 0  
ALL_REQUIRED_CUSTOMER_MOMENTS_AND_SAFETY_BOUNDARIES_INSPECTED: yes  
PASS_EVIDENCE_ORIENTATION: README.md | START-HERE.md :: The orientation documents introduce CanopyOps, describe its purpose for cannabis cultivation, and guide users toward the first installation step. They explain the product’s scope, highlight key features, and provide clear navigation links to subsequent sections.  
PASS_EVIDENCE_INSTALLATION: INSTALL.md :: Installation instructions detail four supported deployment paths, list required files, and outline troubleshooting steps for common errors. The guide distinguishes between plugin, standalone skill, Claude.ai upload, and Claude Code setups while ensuring users can recover from missing references.  
PASS_EVIDENCE_FIRST_VALUE: EXAMPLE-TOUR.md | JUDGE-QUICKSTART.md :: The first-value section demonstrates how to create a crop plan, diagnose an incident, and review harvest readiness using fictional data. It lists example artifacts, clarifies required inputs, and warns that real decisions must be verified by qualified personnel.  
PASS_EVIDENCE_NORMAL_USE: FAQ.md | SAFETY-AND-SCOPE.md :: FAQ and safety documents explain everyday usage scenarios, clarify authority boundaries, and distinguish reversible containment from irreversible actions. They list common questions, warn against unauthorized pesticide use, and provide guidance on interpreting sensor data responsibly.  
PASS_EVIDENCE_RECOVERY: SUPPORT.md :: Support documentation offers troubleshooting tips, clarifies installation failures, and directs users to issue templates for bug reporting. It lists recovery steps for missing references, script unavailability, and permission prompts while encouraging clear evidence submission.  
PASS_EVIDENCE_PRIVACY_SECURITY: DATA-AND-PRIVACY.md | TERMS-OF-USE.md | SECURITY.md :: Privacy and security sections state that CanopyOps does not collect user data, host services, or transmit information externally. They explain the absence of telemetry, clarify data handling by the AI host, and warn against sharing sensitive cultivation records without proper safeguards.  
PASS_EVIDENCE_EVIDENCE_LIMITS: VERIFICATION-v0.1.5.md :: Verification documentation lists completed deterministic tests, archive parity checks, and customer-document reachability validations. It distinguishes between performed evidence and untested live-host behavior, warning that field fitness or jurisdictional updates are not covered by these static checks.  
PASS_EVIDENCE_SUPPORT_MAINTENANCE: SUPPORT.md | RELEASE-NOTES-v0.1.5.md :: Support and release notes describe maintenance procedures, update instructions, and known issues. They list version history, archive custody details, and encourage users to report bugs via the issue tracker while noting that no live-host activation is guaranteed by these documents.  
PASS_EVIDENCE_RIGHTS_PROVENANCE: ATTRIBUTION.md | LICENSE.md | TRADEMARKS.md | NOTICE.md | CONTRIBUTING.md | BUILD-WEEK.md :: Rights and provenance files clarify licensing terms, attribution requirements, trademark usage, and contribution guidelines. They explain that the core scripts are MIT-licensed while the Augment content is CC BY-ND 4.0, and they warn against unauthorized derivative distribution.  
PASS_EVIDENCE_ARCHIVE_CUSTODY: ARCHIVE-CUSTODY.md :: Archive custody documentation enumerates canonical release artifacts, their file names, intended use cases, and hash verification data. It lists each archive type, explains extraction parity checks, and warns that the archives are for distribution only, not live-host execution.  
UNEXECUTED_CONDITIONS: fresh Codex marketplace installation | plugin discovery and task activation | live resource loading | script execution under customer permissions | live Claude upload and activation | broad repeated-model behavior | cultivation-field fitness | production reliability | jurisdictional currency | legal and compliance review | equipment integration | browser and keyboard testing | screen-reader testing | localization testing | representative-user testing | accessibility conformance | official OpenAI Plugins Directory appearance | accountable publication approval | customer outcomes  

REVIEW_PASS_WITH_CONDITIONS
